strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform demonstrating entrepreneurial, builder mindset
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML depth — no published AI products, research, or platforms at scale
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field
Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) below typical Director-level IC / Principal scope; no evidence of advising strategic customers at executive level
response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot engineering experience and a founder mindset through GISCollective, with recent hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the profile lacks the recognized AI expertise, advanced AI-related degree, and Director-level strategic advisory footprint that this Principal role emphasizes, making fit partial rather than strong.
